articles.title: PulteGroup (PHM) Buys 419 Acres In Florida For Del Webb Verona Expansion
articles.summary: PulteGroup, NYSE:PHM, has acquired 419 acres in Pasco County, Florida. The site will be used to develop Explore by Del Webb Verona, a new active adult community. This project expands the Explore by Del Webb brand in a growing active adult housing segment. PulteGroup is moving ahead with a large Florida land purchase at a time when its stock trades at $132.59 and has risen 20.0% over the past year.
